signals.raw:
US Regulators Confirm SOL and ETH as Commodities in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This classification eliminates major legal uncertainty for allocators, enabling spot ETFs for both (ETH since 2024, SOL since Oct 2025) with current AUM at $48B for ETH and $4.8B for SOL.[1]

signals.headline: Lakers Rookie Adou Thiero Returns from Face Injury vs
signals.raw:
Lakers Rookie Adou Thiero Returns from Face Injury vs. Thunder, Cleared for Key Minutes Amid Injuries to Reaves, Doncic, Smart** | NO | LOW confidence[2]

Adou Thiero, Lakers' second-round rookie forward (6'8", Arkansas), returned Tuesday to the game against OKC after an elbow to the face in Q2, playing with 7:54 left in Q3 and likely seeing ongoing meaningful minutes for the banged-up roster[2].
